source_context: Phase 11 workflow seed set derived from family audit findings and likely future citation-agent recommendations.

recommendations.summary: Comparison pages should force a clearer verdict with best-fit, worst-fit, and deciding-factor language near the top.
recommendations.suggested_action: Upgrade the compare family renderer and answer-shape scaffolding.

recommendations.summary: Scenario pages need a what-matters-first triage block, an evidence list, and a do-not-do-yet section.
recommendations.suggested_action: Upgrade the scenario family renderer and module contract.

recommendations.summary: FAQ answers should stop leading with soft hedges and move the deciding condition into the first sentence.
The demand-letter page should open with a faster triage sequence and a what-not-to-do checklist.
recommendations.suggested_action: Apply a page-local patch to quick answer, top module, FAQ block, and routing copy.

recommendations.summary: The unpaid-bills sale-right page should include a more explicit records-and-notice checklist.
recommendations.suggested_action: Apply a page-local patch focused on documents, notices, and sale-right sequencing.

recommendations.summary: Add a validator that requires comparison pages to expose a verdict block and at least three named deciding factors.
recommendations.suggested_action: Create a compare-family validator rule and wire it into validate:all.

recommendations.summary: Add a validator that requires what-matters-first plus evidence and do-not-do blocks on scenario pages.
recommendations.suggested_action: Create a scenario-family validator rule and wire it into validate:all.

recommendations.summary: Add a validator that flags FAQ openings that start with a soft hedge and do not immediately state a deciding condition.
recommendations.suggested_action: Create an FAQ hedge-opening validator rule and wire it into validate:all.

recommendations.summary: The horse-sale cluster would benefit from a damages-and-remedies explainer connected to misrepresentation and refund disputes.
recommendations.suggested_action: Create a new support page and wire it into the horse-sale cluster.

recommendations.summary: The liability cluster needs stronger state-linked follow-on pages for warning-sign, waiver, and statute-specific fork points.
recommendations.suggested_action: Add state-linked support pages and strengthen state routing.

recommendations.summary: Scenario and FAQ flows should route more aggressively into state-specific legal fork pages when state law is likely outcome-determinative.
recommendations.suggested_action: Upgrade routing logic and related-links generation for state-specific topics.

recommendations.summary: The horse-lease-agreement page should tighten its clause ordering and include a stronger pays-for-what table.
recommendations.suggested_action: Apply a page-local patch to quick answer, top module, and FAQ block.
